description: Standing-pools table shown before interactive prompt.
assertion: table_shown is true; prompt_shown_yet is false

description: User is prompted and responds 'cancel' to abort the operation.

state.prompt_text: Which pool would you like to stop? Enter pool name or 'cancel' to abort:

description: User cancelled. No changes: index.json unchanged, no shutdown signal sent, command exits cleanly.
assertion: index_changed is false; shutdown_sent is false; result is 'cancelled'
